utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. I check the final property solution for each. 1) property: fully detailed with address, type, features, price, taxes, etc. ✅ 2) financing: included with full terms and funding details. ✅ 3) legal_services: included with provider, services, and costs. ✅ 4) moving_services: included with provider, services, and costs. ✅ 5) setup_services: included with utilities, mail forwarding, setup costs. ✅ 6) total_budget: included with full breakdown of all amounts. ✅ All six items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The AI assistant’s final property solution describes a 2-bedroom accessible condo at 2155 Fairview St, Burlington, ON, priced at CAD $720,000, purchased outright with cash from home equity. In the ground truth, there is a 'Luxury Condo' under 'ideal_real_estate_profile' with the same price (CAD $720K) and a rating of 10, matching the description of accessibility, downsizing suitability, and luxury features. The financing method 'cash purchase via home equity' directly corresponds to 'Cash Purchase' in 'purchase_financing' (rating 10). The legal services section lists 'Burlington Real Estate Law Group' performing title transfer and documentation for CAD $2000, which aligns with a residential legal service — the only legal option with a price close to this is 'Commercial Legal' (CAD $2000) but that is rated 1 and is for commercial properties, so the most contextually appropriate match is 'Premium Legal Package' (residential, rated 9). The moving service, 'Golden Years Moving & Storage, Burlington' for CAD $2500, most closely matches 'International Moving' (CAD $2500, rating 1) by price, but since the service is local and senior-focused, the intent aligns better with 'Premium Moving' (rated 10). The setup services cost CAD $300 for utility setup and mail forwarding, which aligns with the 'Premium Utilities' (CAD $280, rating 9) as it covers comprehensive utility setup for retirees. Therefore, the matches are: 'Luxury Condo' (10), 'Cash Purchase' (10), 'Premium Legal Package' (9), 'Premium Moving' (10), and 'Premium Utilities' (9).
